summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Winner's Consulting authentication and Admin CMS. All core features are functional: user registration, login, admin login, protected routes, admin dashboard, user dashboard, favorites, messages, and applications APIs.

minor.issue: Returns 520 instead of 401 (proxy/CDN issue, not backend bug)

ui_bugs.issue: Register button opens modal in login mode instead of register mode, requiring users to click 'S'inscrire' link to switch

action_items: MINOR: Fix register button to open modal in register mode by passing 'register' as initialMode prop
critical_code_review_comments: AuthModal.jsx: The initialMode prop exists but the onOpenAuth('register') call from Header.jsx should work - investigate why modal defaults to login mode
seed_data_creation: Test users and data created during testing will remain in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core authentication, authorization, and admin CMS features are working. Backend APIs are well-tested with pytest. The only minor issue is the register button not opening modal in register mode directly. data-testid attributes are properly implemented for: login-button, register-button, user-menu-button, dashboard-link, admin-link, logout-button.

backend: Public endpoints (offers, universities, housing) - No auth required ✓
frontend: Admin login shows admin-link in dropdown ✓
Admin CMS accessible for admin users ✓
Registration flow works (with mode switch workaround) ✓
